Bash(python -c "
from rulestools_mcp.repo import ensure_repo
import sys
repo = ensure_repo\(\)
sys.path.insert\(0, str\(repo\)\)
from common.nesting import check as check_nesting
from pathlib import Path
issues = list\(check_nesting\(Path\('D:/REPO/SLINT/RustUI/ui/shared/accordion.slint'\), Path\('D:/REPO/SLINT/RustUI/ui/shared/accordion.slint'\).read_text\(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\).splitlines\(\), lang='slint', max_abs_depth=6\)\)
print\(f'{len\(issues\)} nesting issues'\)
for i in issues: print\(f'  line {i.line}: {i.message}'\)
" 2>&1)
